stonetop.summary: A green youth doing their turn at the chief's hillfort.

system.concept: A green youth doing their turn at the chief's hillfort.
system.description: Every able-bodied youth does a turn at their chief's hillfort — a year or two drilling, marching, learning the spear, standing in the shield wall. They sing songs, talk big, and maybe get their hands red. A few are picked for the chief's standing force; most head home to defend their hamlets and swell the ranks when called. That's the idea, at least.
